abilities.name: Bullseye
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) when targeting a model within 1" of an Assault marker.

abilities.name: Demise (Haunted Rounds)
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is killed, it may be placed in base contact with an Assault marker within 6". If it does so, it heals 2 and then removes the marker.

actions.name: Vanishing Round
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model gains a Hidden token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Spent Shell-Casing
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an Assault or Remains marker. Make an Assault marker within 6" of the target.

triggers.name: Dead Man's Switch
triggers.text: Enemy models within (t)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Ghost of the Battlefield
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.
